title: FBI Photo 1
sentence: Infrared still image (black hot) captured of unidentified object over western United States in December of 2025.

title: FBI Photo A5
sentence: Infrared still image (black hot) captured of unidentified object over western United States in December of 2025.

title: FBI Photo B2
sentence: Infrared still image (black hot) captured of unidentified object over western United States in September of 2025.

title: FBI Photo B7
sentence: Infrared still image (black hot) captured of unidentified object below helicopter over western United States in September of 2025.

title: FBI Photo B18
sentence: Infrared still image (black hot) captured of unidentified object(s) over western United States in September of 2025.

title: FBI Photo B20
sentence: Infrared still image (black hot) captured of unidentified object(s) over western United States in September of 2025.

title: 2024-04-30 Composite Sketch
sentence: Actual site photo with FBI Lab rendered graphic overlay depicting corroborating eyewitness reports from September 2023 of an apparent ellipsoid bronze metallic object materializing out of a bright light in the sky, 130-195 feet in length, and disappearing instantaneously.

title: NASA-UAP-VM6, Apollo 17, 1972
sentence: Archival imagery from the Apollo 17 mission to the Moon. The yellow box contains an enlarged area of the original photo in which three lights are visible above the lunar terrain.

title: DOW-UAP-PR19, Unresolved UAP Report, Middle East, May 2022
sentence: Still from a video that a U.S. military operator reported as featuring UAP flying across their screen.

title: DOW-UAP-PR26, Unresolved UAP Report, United Arab Emirates, October 2023
sentence: Still from a video captured near the United Arab Emirates featuring reported UAP.

title: DOW-UAP-PR34, Unresolved UAP Report, Greece, October 2023
sentence: A U.S. military operator reported observing UAP flying just above the surface of the ocean, taking multiple 90-degree turns at high speed.

title: DOW-UAP-PR35, Unresolved UAP Report, Greece, October 2023
sentence: A U.S. military operator reported UAP near Greece flying straight above the ocean towards land.

title: DOW-UAP-PR38, Unresolved UAP Report, Middle East, 2013
sentence: Still from a video featuring an eight-pointed area of contrast captured via infrared sensor.

title: DOW-UAP-PR43, Unresolved UAP Report, Africa, 2025
sentence: A U.S. military operator reported UAP while operating within African airspace.

title: DOW-UAP-PR45, Unresolved UAP Report, Middle East, 2020
sentence: In 2020, the U.S. Air Force reported UAP in the southern United States.

title: DOW-UAP-PR46, Unresolved UAP Report, INDOPACOM, 2024
sentence: U.S. Indo-Pacific Command reported UAP that resembles a football-shaped body near Japan.

title: DOW-UAP-PR49, Unresolved UAP Report, Department of the Army, 2026
sentence: The U.S. Army reported UAP in North America in 2026.
